allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\('c:/repos/fullstack_proj/project_5/json.db.json'\); const alice = db.users.find\(u => u.name && u.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('alice'\)\); console.log\('alice:', JSON.stringify\(alice\)\); const aliceAlbums = db.albums.filter\(a => a.userId === alice.id\); console.log\('albums:', JSON.stringify\(aliceAlbums\)\); console.log\('photo counts:', aliceAlbums.map\(a => \({id:a.id, n: db.photos.filter\(p=>p.albumId===a.id\).length}\)\)\); console.log\('max album id:', Math.max\(...db.albums.map\(a=>a.id\)\)\); console.log\('max photo id:', Math.max\(...db.photos.map\(p=>p.id\)\)\);")
